name: jcodemunch-mcp-vscode
description: Auto-reindexes saved files and paints a per-symbol risk-density gutter (yellow/orange/red dots at risky function headers, hover for breakdown). Powered by jcodemunch-mcp.

mcp.description: jCodeMunch MCP — code exploration, symbol search, risk analysis, and indexing. Provides tools: resolve_repo, search_symbols, search_text, get_symbol_source, get_context_bundle, get_file_outline, get_blast_radius, find_references, get_call_hierarchy, find_dead_code, get_dependency_cycles, plan_turn, get_ranked_context, index_file, register_edit.

jcodemunch.indexOnSave.command.description: Path to the jcodemunch-mcp executable (defaults to looking on PATH).

jcodemunch.indexOnSave.debounceMs.description: Per-file debounce window in milliseconds — rapid successive saves of the same file collapse into a single reindex.

jcodemunch.indexOnSave.exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to skip on save.

jcodemunch.riskGutter.enabled.description: Paint a per-symbol risk-density gutter (yellow/orange/red dots at function headers; green = invisible). Refreshes on file open + on save. Disable if it gets noisy.

jcodemunch.riskGutter.debounceMs.description: Per-file debounce window for the risk-gutter refresh on save.
